description: Meridian Holdings has restructured into three subsidiaries and needs its Snipe-IT instance (http://localhost:8000, admin / password) configured for multi-company asset tracking. Enable Full Multiple Companies Support and create three companies: Meridian Technologies, Meridian Media, and Meridian Healthcare. Assign assets ASSET-MT001, ASSET-MT002, and ASSET-MT003 to Meridian Technologies; ASSET-MM001, ASSET-MM002, and ASSET-MM003 to Meridian Media; and ASSET-MH001, ASSET-MH002, and ASSET-MH003 to Meridian Healthcare. Do not modify any other assets' company assignments.
